title: artemisia suksdorfii
intro: Artemisia suksdorfii, also known as Suksdorf's sagebrush or mountain sagewort, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its volatile oils, which have antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Artemisia suksdorfii include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in herbal remedies.
